---
title: "Militant Here on Earth By Charlotte M. Yonge."
---

## Militant Here on Earth By Charlotte M. Yonge.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1882-3
**Genre:** Non-fiction: theology
**Format:** Articles in journal

**Publisher:** Not separately published

### Notes

The <i>Watchword</i> was the journal of the Society of Watchers and Workers: An Association of Mutual Help and Service for Invalids, founded by Edith Sophia Jacob in 1879.  These articles may have been reprinted from elsewhere (perhaps from the <i>Monthly Paper of Sunday Teaching</i>?).

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
